headlines.title: NASA barrels ahead with moon base plans, doling out nearly $600 million in new contracts
headlines.description: The announcement is the latest in a stream of funding contracts NASA has awarded private companies in its effort to establish a permanent presence on the moon.

headlines.title: TikTok reaches settlement with Florida teen ahead of July social media addiction trial
headlines.description: The case was part of consolidated litigation alleging major social platforms used addictive designs that harmed youths’ mental health.

headlines.title: 12% of successful scams in 2025 used AI or deepfakes, according to poll of U.S. adults
headlines.description: As AI is adopted across industries, it’s also being taken up by scammers.

headlines.title: Kids online safety package clears House, drawing warnings from digital rights and tech groups
headlines.description: The KIDS Act received broad bipartisan support. But the legislation is expected to face challenges in the Senate.

headlines.title: A golden ticket for AI: Netflix re-creates Gene Wilder’s voice for new ‘Willy Wonka’ show
headlines.description: The streamer said it received the consent of the late actor’s estate for its new competition series, which will debut in September.

headlines.title: Voters of both parties want tighter AI regulation, poll finds
headlines.description: A new survey from the AI Policy Institute finds bipartisan support for legislation that targets powerful AI systems.

headlines.title: U.S. government gives Anthropic green light for limited re-release of Mythos 5
headlines.description: The U.S. government is allowing Anthropic to deploy its Mythos 5 model to a select group of customers and partners, according to a letter from Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick to Anthropic that was seen by NBC News

headlines.title: Crowds outside Supreme Court cheer at birthright citizenship decision
headlines.description: NBC News’ Julia Ainsley reports from outside the Supreme Court where crowds cheered and celebrated after the court rejected President Donald Trump’s attempt to limit birthright citizenship.

headlines.title: Supreme Court upholds transgender bans in girls’ and women’s sports
headlines.description: Delivering another blow to LGBTQ rights, the court ruled against two students who had challenged restrictive laws in West Virginia and Idaho.

headlines.title: Supreme Court strikes down long-standing campaign finance restrictions
headlines.description: The provision challenged by Vice President JD Vance and others limits how much party committees can spend in coordination with individual candidates.

headlines.title: Supreme Court agrees to hear challenge to assault weapon bans
headlines.description: The court will consider laws in Connecticut and Cook County, Illinois, that ban AR-15s and other assault weapons used in mass shootings, including at Sandy Hook Elementary School.

headlines.title: Inside the new space shuttle ‘Endeavour’ exhibit at California Science Center
headlines.description: NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz previews the new exhibit at the California Science Center, where visitors will soon be able to view NASA’s space shuttle Endeavour in its ready-to-launch position.
